description: Product Description Looking for a cozy yet practical solution to keep your hands warm this winter? Look no further than the latest addition to the Heat Holders range! Introducing the Ladies Heat Holders Fingerless Gloves with Converter Mitt - the perfect combination of warmth and functionality. Made from beautifully soft and fabulously warm Heatweaver yarn, these mitten-style gloves offer you the best of both worlds with open-ended fingers for when you need a delicate touch, such as delving in your purse or texting, and warm mitten caps to slip back over in an instant. Keep your hands toasty with these stylish and practical gloves. HEAT HOLDERS YARN Specially developed for high performance insulation against the cold, this thermal yarn is designed to keep you snug and cozy even on the coldest of days. But it's not just about warmth - our Heat Holders Yarn also boasts superior moisture breathing abilities, meaning it can wick away moisture to keep you dry and comfortable too. HEAT HOLDERS CUFF Our extendable cuffs are designed to unfold and create a long protective sleeve that hugs the wrist, providing superior insulation against the cold and ensuring your gloves stay in place no matter what. Made from high-quality materials and engineered for maximum comfort. 2.3 TOG RATING Whether you're skiing on a mountain or simply walking to work on a blustery day, you can rest assured that these gloves will keep your hands warm and toasty. While a standard thermal glove may have a Tog rating of just 0.89, Heat Holders gloves are engineered to provide exceptional warmth and insulation, even in the most extreme cold weather conditions with as big 2.3 tog rating. Ladies thermal fingerless converter gloves are great because they provide warmth and insulation to the hands while still allowing for finger dexterity. The converter design of these gloves allows for easy movement of the fingers and hands, making them a practical accessory for everyday use. In addition to their functional benefits, ladies thermal converter gloves also offer a stylish and versatile accessory option that can be worn with a range of outfits. There are plenty of reasons why you might choose to buy men's Heat Holders fleece-lined thermal fingerless gloves over other gloves: Superior warmth: Heat Holders gloves are designed with a special thermal yarn and an innovative knitting technology that produces an extra-long looped cushion pile to hold in more warm air, increasing their TOG rating. This means that these gloves are incredibly effective at keeping your hands warm, even in the coldest temperatures. Comfortable fit: The fleece lining of these gloves is incredibly soft and comfortable, making them a pleasure to wear for extended periods. Additionally, the converter mitten design allows for maximum flexibility and dexterity, so you can easily perform tasks that require the use of your fingers but also keep them warm with the mitten attachment. High-quality construction: Heat Holders gloves are made to the highest standards of quality, using premium materials and construction techniques to ensure durability and longevity. Stylish design: These gloves feature a sleek and stylish design with a converter mitten that looks great with a wide range of outfits. The fleece lining layer in these gloves provides a soft and cozy barrier against the cold. Fleece is a type of synthetic material that is designed to mimic the properties of wool, but with the added benefit of being lighter in weight and faster drying. This makes it an ideal material for cold weather gear, as it provides excellent insulation without being too heavy or bulky. Heat Holders gloves are made with high-quality fibers that are durable and long-lasting, ensuring that your gloves will withstand wear and tear and continue to provide warmth and comfort season after season. Unmatched warmth: Heat Holders products are designed to provide unparalleled warmth, thanks to their advanced insulation technology and specially designed yarn. With Heat Holders, you can be sure that you'll stay warm and cosy even on the coldest days of winter. Superior comfort: Heat Holders products are not only warm, but they're also incredibly comfortable. Made with high-quality materials and designed with the customer in mind, our products are soft to the touch, breathable, and lightweight. You'll hardly even notice you're wearing them! Wide range of products: Heat Holders offers a wide range of products, including socks, gloves, hats, and more. No matter what your cold weather needs are, we've got you covered. And because all of our products are designed with the same level of quality and attention to detail, you can trust that you're getting a great product no matter what you buy. Trusted brand: Heat Holders is a well-known and trusted brand in the cold weather gear industry.
